{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323194610882556D9CDDDD0C8539C"}"},"total":45},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610094145455457086","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看很轻松，放松心情天暮文"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771865845,"group_id":"7521995405660277822","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+HNzl5x9kpg4qustJjSbyI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"6956846743","user_name":"昆吾仙宫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6956846743","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7521995405660277822","book_info":{"abstract":"在星际穿梭中，直播系统6688前往21世纪寻找宿主，途中能量受损。危急时刻，它匆忙绑定女主，开启一场特殊直播，把女主生活展现给各朝各代之人。
系统还会给观看直播的古人发放福利，借此获取功德转化为能量。这一神奇举动，让众多有为之君看到人民力量的伟大，也见识到科技的无限潜力。各朝代受直播启发，发展道路愈发顺畅，成功规避诸多历史遗憾与伤痛，百姓生活也日益美好。
